title: Order Not Received: Etsy Tracking and Recovery Steps
snippet: If an Etsy order has not arrived, confirm shipment status and open a support path based on tracking state.
resolution_steps: Check order status and tracking updates in account history.
Confirm shipping address and expected delivery window.
Contact seller with order number and last tracking event.
Open or escalate a case if delivery window has passed.

title: Item Not As Described: Evidence Checklist
snippet: Collecting clear evidence early speeds up item-not-as-described resolution.
resolution_steps: Capture photos showing the mismatch or damage.
Compare received item details to listing description.
Send concise summary to seller with requested remedy.
Escalate to platform support if no response or no resolution.

title: Refund Delay or Denial: SLA and Escalation
snippet: Use refund SLA checkpoints to decide when to escalate.
resolution_steps: Verify refund decision status and timestamp.
Confirm payment method and expected settlement timeline.
Provide supporting evidence for disputed outcomes.
Escalate when SLA is exceeded or communication stalls.

title: Seller Communication Gap: Response Workflow
snippet: Structured follow-up messages reduce seller-response delays.
resolution_steps: Send one concise follow-up with order context and requested action.
Wait for the documented response window.
Log timestamps of prior outreach attempts.
Escalate to support with communication history attached.

title: Account or Case Hold: Verification Requirements
snippet: Account or case holds usually require specific verification artifacts before release.
resolution_steps: Review hold notice and identify exact required documents.
Submit requested verification artifacts once, clearly labeled.
Track review status and expected decision date.
Escalate if hold remains unresolved beyond published SLA.

title: Shipping Cost or Delay Complaints: Resolution Playbook
snippet: Clarify shipping-fee policy and delay expectations to reduce repeat complaints.
resolution_steps: Confirm shipping fee and service level selected at checkout.
Share current carrier status and expected delivery update.
Offer policy-compliant remediation when delay exceeds SLA.
Document recurring lanes with high delay rates for ops follow-up.

title: Checkout and Payment Failures on Marketplace Orders
snippet: Most checkout failures can be narrowed to payment validation or session integrity issues.
resolution_steps: Retry in a clean browser session and verify billing details.
Confirm payment method is supported and not rate-limited.
Capture exact error text and timestamp.
Escalate recurring error signatures to payments engineering.

title: Fraud and Unauthorized Activity in Marketplace Orders
snippet: High-risk fraud reports should be triaged immediately with account-protection actions.
resolution_steps: Collect timestamps and details of suspicious activity.
Lock or secure affected account/payment method where possible.
Submit fraud report with evidence package.
Provide customer with expected investigation timeline.
